question: What major is every student who does not own a cat as a pet, and also how old are they?
gold_sql: SELECT major ,  age FROM student WHERE stuid NOT IN (SELECT T1.stuid FROM student AS T1 JOIN has_pet AS T2 ON T1.stuid  =  T2.stuid JOIN pets AS T3 ON T3.petid  =  T2.petid WHERE T3.pettype  =  'cat')
predicted_sql: SELECT attr_f1425d, temporal_span FROM student WHERE attr_ebaa72 NOT IN (SELECT T1.attr_ebaa72 FROM has_pet AS T1 JOIN pets AS T2 ON T1.attr_f593a2 = T2.attr_f593a2 WHERE T2.attr_b92885 = 'cat')
raw_response: SELECT attr_f1425d, temporal_span FROM student WHERE attr_ebaa72 NOT IN (SELECT T1.attr_ebaa72 FROM has_pet AS T1 JOIN pets AS T2 ON T1.attr_f593a2 = T2.attr_f593a2 WHERE T2.attr_b92885 = 'cat')
